                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| 2026-03-30                  | —                                                                                                                                                                                                              | feat: v4.0.2 ACE-Inspired Learning Patterns — 3 patterns from ace-agent/ace (arXiv 2510.04618). (1) Goal self-assessment in executor.ts: after inferWithTools succeeds, selfAssess() checks if result satisfies completionCriteria via lightweight LLM call. If not met, injects reflection and re-runs with full tool context (up to 2 rounds). selfAssessRounds tracked in GoalResult. (2) Strategy bullets table (infrastructure): strategy_bullets in schema.sql with helpful/harmful counters. CRUD module (strategy-bullets.ts). Not yet wired to enrichment. (3) Learning consolidation (infrastructure): consolidateLearnings() using existing embedding infra. Pairwise cosine similarity, groups above 0.85, keeps best trust_tier. Dry-run mode, 50-merge cap. 32 new tests. 168 src, 67 test files, 723 tests.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| 2026-03-30                  | —                                                                                                                                                                                                              | fix: v4.0.1 Inference Robustness — 3 fixes. (1) Truncated tool args sanitization: when model output hits max_tokens mid-JSON,`function.arguments` in conversation history is replaced with valid JSON (`{_truncated:true}`) so subsequent API calls don't get HTTP 400 from providers. Also sanitizes in catch block for any malformed args. (2) Parameter alias normalization: `normalizeArgAliases()`maps 12 common LLM parameter name confusions (file_path→path, oldString→old_string, contentFile→content_file, etc.) before Zod validation. Poka-yoke pattern — prevents tool execution failures when model uses camelCase or prefixed variants. (3) wp_publish file-first workflow: tool description updated to instruct ALWAYS using file_write + content_file for any content longer than 2 paragraphs, even new posts. Inline`content`parameter description changed to short-only. Prevents model from generating 15K+ chars in tool args. Root cause: model generated 15,350-char wp_publish args → truncated → malformed JSON poisoned conversation → all 3 providers rejected with HTTP 400 → cascading failure across rounds. Post 648 published empty because file_write failed (path undefined, alias bug). | 2026-03-27                  |`4302cb1`                                                                                                                                                                                                     | fix: Jarvis reliability — 7 fixes across scope, model routing, thread poisoning, WP config, and thread truncation. (1) COMMIT task completion: scope pattern expanded to 8+ trigger forms, confirmation rule trimmed 5→3 with COMMIT exemption, journal gated behind`commit_journal`scope group. (2) Scope accumulation:`.slice(-2)`limits history scan to last 2 user messages, preventing tool bloat (60→25-35 tools). (3) WP_SITES invalid JSON: unquoted keys/values caused silent`{}`return. (4) Poisoned thread: 5 new poison patterns + flushed 11 toxic DB entries teaching learned helplessness. (5) Chat model routing: messaging tier changed from`flash`/GLM-5 to `standard`/Qwen-first. (6) Thread response cap doubled 800→1600 chars — truncation was cutting off article review state, causing "Continúa" loops. (7) Scope group diagnostic logging added. 600 tests, 60 files. | 2026-03-27                  | —                                                                                                                                                                                                              | fix: Vision routing — 3 bugs preventing Jarvis from seeing uploaded images. (1) Image documents (Telegram "Send as File") fell to `downloadRawText()`instead of`downloadImageAsBase64()`. (2) Messaging classifier hardcodes `modelTier: "flash"`→ fallback/glm-5 (non-vision) — fast-runner now overrides to primary/qwen3.5-plus when conversation has images. (3) First-round ✅ nudge fired on short conversational replies, discarding valid responses — nudge now requires >500 chars. 600 tests, 60 files. | 2026-03-26                  | —                                                                                                                                                                                                              | fix: Jarvis scope — exa_search and browser always available. (1) Moved exa_search from keyword-gated SPECIALTY_TOOLS to CORE_TOOLS (always scoped, like web_search). (2) Moved browser**goto + browser**markdown from keyword-gated BROWSER_TOOLS to MISC_TOOLS (always scoped for basic web reading). (3) Updated system prompt capabilities to always mention exa_search alongside web_search and always show browser capability. Interactive browser tools (click/fill/scroll) remain keyword-gated. 600 tests, 60 files. | 2026-03-26                  | —                                                                                                                                                                                                              | feat: v2.28 — HyperAgents evolutionary variant archive for self-tuning. (1)`tune_variants`table — persists winning sandbox configs across overnight runs with parent-child lineage tracking. (2) Parent selection — 3 strategies (best/latest/score_prop) so each run evolves from the best previous variant instead of starting from scratch. (3) Staged eval gate — free scope+classification check before expensive tool_selection LLM eval, saves ~40% inference budget on bad mutations. (4) Startup activation —`activateBestVariant()`loads best variant's config overrides (tool descriptions, scope patterns) at startup. (5) Serialization —`SandboxConfig`(Map/RegExp) ↔ JSON roundtrip for DB persistence. 3 new files, 14 new tests. 590 tests, 60 files.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| 2026-03-25                  | —                                                                                                                                                                                                              | feat: 3 new features from awesome-llm-apps + Memoria analysis. (1) **Exa Search tool** — semantic web search via Exa API (category-scoped: company/news/research/github, include_text, date filter). Registered in builtin tools + MISC_TOOLS scope. (2) **Signal Intelligence ritual** — 6:00 AM daily, heavy runner, scans web+Exa for project-relevant signals, scores by relevance×risk, stores digest in user_facts, emails summary. (3) **Trust Tier Decay** — conversations table gets trust_tier (1-4) + source columns, exponential confidence decay in SQLite recall (T1:365d, T2:180d, T3:90d, T4:30d half-lives), callers annotated (reflector→T2, outcome-tracker→T4, router→T2, memory_store→T3). (4) **Governance Cooldowns** — per-task memory_store cap (5/task), setMemoryTaskContext() wired in fast-runner + orchestrator. (5) **Memory Steering Rules** — expanded system prompt lifecycle protocol (when to search/store/skip). Also: CRM-Azteca`investigar_prospecto`tool (sales intelligence pipeline), Google Workspace drive scope test fix. 576 tests, 58 files. | 2026-03-24                  | —                                                                                                                                                                                                              | feat: Prometheus engine 5 upstream-inspired improvements. (1) PRESERVE+ADD iterative compression — detects existing`[CONTEXT SUMMARY]`and updates incrementally instead of regenerating. (2) Goal survival across compression —`contextInjection`param threads active goal through compressions. (3) 413 auto-compression — catches payload-too-large, force-compresses, retries once. (4) Convergence detection — two-layer: orchestrator tool-call-per-goal ratio replan trigger (>10.0) + inferWithTools consecutive identical tool call break (3x). (5) Tool call repair —`tryRepairJson`fixes trailing commas, trailing garbage, unquoted keys. Also: transcription.ts enriched with timestamps/segments/language/duration from Whisper verbose_json. 519 tests, 52 files. | 2026-03-24                  |`3fb74d5`                                                                                                                                                                                                     | feat: v2.26 Session 4 — Strategic Autonomy. (4E) requiredTools validation on TaskSubmission — post-execution check, auto-retry once, Telegram alert on double-miss. Applied to morning/nightly rituals. toolCalls propagated through RunnerOutput for both fast and heavy runners. (4A) Event reactor: task.completed → objective completion suggestion, recurring streak milestones (7/30/50/100/200/365), goal.completed → Telegram celebration + project archive suggestion, objective.completed → next objective or goal promotion suggestion. (4B) COMMIT-aware proactive scanner: stale goal detection (14d), streak protection (6PM nudge), project-goal sync, objective completion detection. (4C) Conversation-to-COMMIT pipeline: intent detection in system prompt ("necesito/tengo que/hay que/debería"), scope pattern expansion for intent phrases. (4D) Weekly review ritual: Sunday 8PM, heavy runner, full hierarchy scan + project health + accomplishments + next week focus. 500 tests, 51 files. | 2026-03-23                  |`f04a0c6`                                                                                                                                                                                                     | feat: v2.25 — (1) WordPress admin tools: wp_pages, wp_plugins, wp_settings, wp_delete, wp_raw_api (full site management). (3) wp_media_upload supports local file paths (file:// and absolute paths) for gemini_image → WP upload pipeline. (7) Wrap-up context uses lastUserBeforeTools instead of firstUser to prevent out-of-scope responses | 2026-03-21                  | —                                                                                                                                                                                                              | fix: prevent infinite retry loops on max-rounds chat tasks. 3-layer fix: wrap-up instructions include STATUS: DONE_WITH_CONCERNS guidance, fast-runner promotes BLOCKED/NEEDS_CONTEXT with >100 chars to success, reaction engine skips messaging tasks entirely. | 2026-03-16                  |`61b3ee7` | Hindsight API v2 alignment |

## Retention Policy

**Current stance (decided 2026-04-24)**: preserve ALL telemetry rows persistently. No auto-deletion from `mc.db`. Every row is historical evidence of what the system did.

**Decision point**: when `data/mc.db` reaches **500 MB**, revisit. Current size is ~209 MB with a growth rate of ~6 MB/day from `tasks` + `runs` (each row stores full LLM traces, goal graphs, prompts, tool-call chains — avg 40 KB/row). Projected arrival at 500 MB: mid-2026-06 at current rate.

**What was removed**: the previous `scripts/retention.sh` (30-day row prune across 7 tables) disappeared on 2026-04-04 and was never in git. Its cron line was removed on 2026-04-24 to stop silent daily failures. **No replacement — that is intentional.**

**Watchdog enforcement** (`scripts/watchdog.sh` Check 7, every 5 min): alerts via Telegram once per 24h when the 500 MB threshold is crossed. The watchdog is version-controlled — it cannot silently disappear the way `retention.sh` did.

**When the alert fires, the operator decides**:

1. Row-prune vs blob-prune on `tasks`/`runs` (keep metadata, zero the large JSON columns)
2. Retention windows per table class (fast-churning telemetry vs operational history vs financial)
3. Sacred tables (must never prune): `conversations`, `conversation_embeddings`, `conversations_fts*`, `jarvis_files`, `user_facts`, `knowledge_*`, `skills`, `learnings`, `learning_*`, `scheduled_tasks`, `agents`
4. Uncertain (need explicit call): trading tables (`signals*`, `market_*`, `paper_*`, `backtest_*`, `sentiment_*`, `whale_trades`, `chart_patterns`, `trade_theses`, `prediction_markets`), `ads_*`, `seo_*`, `tune_*`

**Do not write a retention script until the above decisions are made.** Deleting data silently was the prior failure mode; writing a script now, before policy is defined, would re-create that risk.

## Known Issues

- SQLite CHECK constraints can't be altered in-place — schema changes require `rm ./data/mc.db`
- SSH keys not configured on VPS — git push uses HTTPS via `gh` CLI
- Hindsight mental model refresh slow with Qwen backend (~2min/model) — using direct recall instead
- Multiple MC restarts can cause Telegram 409 polling conflicts — always kill all instances before restart
- deepseek-v3.2 never voluntarily stops calling tools on research tasks — mitigated by MAX_ROUNDS=7 + wrap-up call
- Primary model (glm-5) intermittently slow on DashScope coding-intl — falls back to qwen3.5-plus
- DashScope coding-intl endpoint has no `/models` listing and no dedicated VL models — but qwen3.5-plus natively supports vision via multimodal content arrays
- ~~Gmail headers garbled for non-ASCII subjects (emojis, em dashes, accented chars)~~ (fixed 2026-03-22, RFC 2047 encoding)
- ~~Scheduled email tasks that fail via wrap-up recovery silently skip gmail_send with no notification~~ (fixed 2026-03-22, delivery verification + Telegram alerts)
- ~~Hallucination detector only ran on chat tasks (conversationHistory gate)~~ (fixed 2026-03-22, removed gate)
- ~~LLM-provided API keys/GA4 IDs/credentials lost between sessions — user_fact_set had no "projects" category and no system prompt directive for technical data~~ (fixed 2026-03-22, projects category + auto-detection safety net)
- ~~Proactive daily counter reset used UTC instead of Mexico City time~~ (fixed 2026-03-19)
- ~~tools_used always empty in task_outcomes (fast-runner returned plain string instead of structured output)~~ (fixed 2026-03-20)
- ~~WordPress content destruction: wp_publish with post_id + partial content replaced entire articles; root cause was 12K tool result truncation in inference adapter stripping article middles~~ (fixed 2026-03-21, file-based pipeline)
- ~~Max-rounds chat tasks triggered infinite retry loops: wrap-up STATUS: BLOCKED → task failed → reaction engine spawned new task with fresh previousAttempts → unbounded chain~~ (fixed 2026-03-21, 3-layer: wrap-up STATUS guidance + BLOCKED→success promotion + messaging retry skip)
- ~~Truncated tool args poison conversation history: when model output hits max_tokens mid-JSON, malformed `function.arguments` stays in thread, causing all subsequent API calls to fail with HTTP 400~~ (fixed 2026-03-30, args sanitization + catch-block guard)
- ~~LLM uses `file_path` instead of `path` for file_write/file_edit: Zod rejects before execute(), tool loops until max rounds~~ (fixed 2026-03-30, normalizeArgAliases with 12 common aliases)
- ~~wp_publish with inline content >12K chars causes truncation cascade~~ (fixed 2026-03-30, file-first workflow in tool description)
